summary: High‑fidelity front‑of‑house recording with Neumann KM140s and Aerco pre‑amp, but no performance details are available.
review: The sole review provides a detailed signal chain—Neumann KM140 microphones into an Aerco pre‑amp feeding a Sony D‑10 Pro recorder—indicating a professional front‑of‑house (soundboard) capture. The reviewer rates the recording five stars, suggesting excellent clarity and mix quality, though no comments are made about the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one detailed review focusing on recording quality (rated 5 stars). No information on show performance, so a neutral estimate for musical quality is used, resulting in an overall rating around the middle of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house capture using Neumann KM140 mics, Aerco pre‑amp and Sony D‑10 Pro; reviewers praise its fidelity.
